placeholders.signingKey: GPG key ID or SSH key

allowedSigners.prompt: Add your configured SSH signing key to {{path}} so Gitmun can verify commits signed with it?

errors.GITMUN_ERROR_SSH_ALLOWED_SIGNERS_HOME_UN: Could not determine the home directory for the allowed signers file.
errors.GITMUN_ERROR_SSH_ALLOWED_SIGNERS_MISSING: Configure user.email before adding an allowed signer.
errors.GITMUN_ERROR_SSH_ALLOWED_SIGNERS_NO_TARG: No allowed signers file is available.
errors.GITMUN_ERROR_SSH_ALLOWED_SIGNERS_SIGNING: Could not resolve user.signingkey to an SSH public key.

profiles.description: Switch between saved identity profiles for different contexts.
